figures.caption: Fig. 1: Approximate predictor-feedback implementations under uniform and bounded sampling.

Fig. 2: (a) Joint 5 tracking with delay D = 0.2s. (b) Measurement sampling schedules: numerical and Case 2 use randomized intervals in [0.02, 0.1], while Case 1 uses fixed sampling h = 0.05. Measurements include Gaussian noise N (0, 0.01). (c) Moving average (0.25s) of the L2 tracking error. (d) Prediction error - zoomed to the first 1s.
